mapper.select: select COUNT(commit_id) AS TotalCommit from commit where repo_id = #{repoId};

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.user_name AS userName, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, COUNT(pr.pr_id) AS mergeRequestCount FROM pr JOIN users u ON pr.user_id = u.user_id WHERE pr.repo_id = #{repoId} GROUP BY u.user_id, u.name, u.user_name, u.avatar_url ORDER BY mergeRequestCount DESC
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE repo_id = #{repoId}) AS totalCommentsAndReplies

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.name AS name, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, IFNULL(SUM(c.comment_count), 0) + IFNULL(SUM(r.reply_count), 0) AS commentCount FROM users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} GROUP BY user_id ) c ON u.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS reply_count FROM reply WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} GROUP BY user_id ) r ON u.user_id = r.user_id WHERE u.user_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM reply WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} ) GROUP BY u.user_id, u.user_name, u.name, u.avatar_url ORDER BY commentCount DESC;

SELECT YEARWEEK(STR_TO_DATE(pr.create_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%f+09:00'), 1) AS week, COUNT(pr.pr_id) AS mergeRequestCount FROM pr WHERE pr.repo_id =#{repoId} AND pr.user_id = #{userId} AND pr.create_at >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 6 WEEK, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%f+09:00') GROUP BY week ORDER BY week DESC LIMIT 6;

SELECT YEARWEEK(STR_TO_DATE(commit.commited_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%f+09:00'), 1) AS week, -- 주별 그룹화 COUNT(commit.commit_id) AS commitCount FROM commit WHERE commit.repo_id = #{repoId} AND commit.pr_id IN (SELECT pr_id FROM pr WHERE user_id = #{userId}) -- 해당 유저가 PR을 생성한 커밋만 포함 AND commit.commited_at >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW() - INTERVAL 6 WEEK, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%f+09:00') -- 최근 6주 동안 GROUP BY week ORDER BY week DESC LIMIT 6;

WITH weeks AS ( SELECT YEARWEEK(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL n WEEK), 1) AS week FROM (SELECT 0 AS n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5) AS numbers ) SELECT w.week, COALESCE(prStats.mergeRequestCount, 0) AS mergeRequestCount, COALESCE(commitStats.commitCount, 0) AS commitCount, COALESCE(commentStats.commentCount, 0) AS commentCount FROM weeks w LEFT JOIN ( SELECT YEARWEEK(STR_TO_DATE(pr.create_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%f+09:00'), 1) AS week, COUNT(pr.pr_id) AS mergeRequestCount FROM pr WHERE pr.repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY week ) prStats ON w.week = prStats.week LEFT JOIN ( SELECT YEARWEEK(STR_TO_DATE(commit.commited_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%f+09:00'), 1) AS week, COUNT(commit.commit_id) AS commitCount FROM commit WHERE commit.repo_id = #{repoId} AND commit.pr_id IN (SELECT pr_id FROM pr WHERE user_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY week ) commitStats ON w.week = commitStats.week LEFT JOIN ( SELECT YEARWEEK(STR_TO_DATE(c.create_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%f+09:00'), 1) AS week, COUNT(c.comment_id) + COUNT(r.re_comment_id) AS commentCount FROM comment c LEFT JOIN reply r ON c.comment_id = r.comment_id AND c.pr_id = r.pr_id AND c.repo_id = r.repo_id WHERE c.repo_id = #{repoId} AND c.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY week ) commentStats ON w.week = commentStats.week ORDER BY w.week DESC LIMIT 6;
